languages.original_text: "I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."

languages.text: "На вашем месте я бы послушал Паскаля. Неправильно установленная аугментация может принести вред, а не пользу — я не раз становился свидетелем подобного".
"I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."
languages.original_text: "На вашем месте я бы послушал Паскаля. Неправильно установленная аугментация может принести вред, а не пользу — я не раз становился свидетелем подобного".

traits.locale_text: "I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."
"I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."
"I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."

languages.text: 「あなたならパスカルの言うことを聞くでしょう。増幅器を正しく設置しないと、害よりも利益の方が大きくなる場合があるのです。私はそれを何度も見てきました」
languages.original_text: "I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたならパスクアルの言うことを聞くでしょう。増幅器を正しく設置しないと、害よりも利益の方が大きくなる場合があるのです。私はそれを何度も見てきました。」

languages.text: « À votre place, j'écouterais Pasqal. Les augmentations installées incorrectement peuvent faire plus de mal que de bien ; j'en ai été témoin plus d'une fois. »
languages.original_text: "I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."

traits.locale_text: « À votre place, j'écouterais Pasqal. Les augmentations installées incorrectement peuvent faire plus de mal que de bien ; j'en ai été témoin plus d'une fois. »

languages.text: "An Eurer Stelle würde ich auf Pasqal hören. Unsachgemäß installierte Augmentationen können mehr schaden als nützen ... das habe ich mehr als einmal gesehen."
languages.original_text: "I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."

traits.locale_text: "An Eurer Stelle würde ich auf Pasqal hören. Unsachgemäß installierte Augmentationen können mehr schaden als nützen ... das habe ich mehr als einmal gesehen."

languages.text: "Sizin yerinizde olsam Pasqal'ı dinlerdim. Yanlış takılan ogmentasyonlar, yarardan çok zarar verebilir. Buna birden çok kez şahit oldum."
languages.original_text: "I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."

traits.locale_text: "Sizin yerinizde olsam Pasqal'ı dinlerdim. Yanlış takılan ogmentasyonlar, yarardan çok zarar verebilir. Buna birden çok kez şahit oldum."

languages.text: «Yo de usted le haría caso a Pasqal. Unos aumentos injertados de manera negligente pueden hacer más mal que bien; lo he visto en más de una ocasión».
languages.original_text: "I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."

traits.locale_text: «Yo de usted le haría caso a Pasqal. Unos aumentos injertados de manera negligente pueden hacer más mal que bien; lo he visto en más de una ocasión».

languages.text: “若是换作我，就会听帕斯卡的。安装不当的植入物弊大于利——这种事我见过不止一次。”
languages.original_text: "I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."

traits.locale_text: “若是换作我，就会听帕斯卡的。安装不当的植入物弊大于利——这种事我见过不止一次。”
